headline: The three sets of earbuds I reach for
summary: An audio reviewer shares their top three consistently used earbuds. Expert insights from 20 years of reviewing hundreds of models. Recommendations based on extensive freelance testing for major tech sites.

headline: BYD to install thousands of 5-minute EV chargers across Europe
summary: Chinese EV giant BYD plans to roll out 3,000 superfast "Flash Chargers" in Europe. Chargers promise full EV charge in just 5 minutes. Initial installations already live in Germany and the UK.

headline: Xbox exploring 'radically different' console business models
summary: Microsoft is re-evaluating its Xbox console hardware strategy. The "RAMageddon crisis" is prompting new approaches for Project Helix. Xbox execs confirm exploring "radically different" business models.

headline: Microsoft is disabling Office 2019 for Mac next month
summary: Office 2019 for Mac will stop working next month due to an expired certificate. Users must buy Office 2024 or a Microsoft 365 subscription to continue editing. This breaks a previous promise for documents to remain editable.

headline: Fable Romance Mechanics Revealed — Including How the RPG Handles Lovemaking
summary: The Fable reboot will allow player-character romance with villagers. Don't expect Baldur's Gate 3-style explicit romance cutscenes. New details surface on the RPG's relationship system.

headline: Assassin's Creed Shadows Final Update Arrives Next Week, Just Over a Year After Launch
summary: Ubisoft confirms the final update for Assassin's Creed Shadows next week. The update concludes additional content for the game. This marks the end of post-launch support just over a year after release.

headline: Xbox Boss: Next-Gen Consoles Need 'Radically Different Business Models'
summary: Xbox boss Asha Sharma addresses rising console costs for next-gen hardware. She states mass audiences cannot afford "thousands of dollars" for new consoles. Microsoft is exploring "radically different business models" for the future.

headline: BBC Scraps Doctor Who Christmas Special, Showrunner & Prod Co Gone
summary: BBC cancels planned Doctor Who one-off Christmas special. Showrunner and production company have parted ways with the BBC. Future of Doctor Who is now uncertain after the scrapped episode.

headline: What we know about Belfast attack and disorder
summary: Houses in Belfast have been set on fire. The disorder follows a knife attack earlier this week. Police are investigating the widespread unrest.

headline: Three arrested over Glasgow unrest and racist assaults
summary: Three people arrested in Glasgow following unrest. Police confirm racist assaults occurred "because of the colour of their skin." Incidents follow a knife attack in Belfast.

headline: Ukraine says missiles hit military plant deep inside Russia
summary: Ukraine claims missile strikes on a Russian military plant. Further attacks reported on a Russian oil refinery and "shadow fleet" tanker. Strikes reportedly occurred deep inside Russian territory and the Black Sea.

headline: BBC cancels Doctor Who Christmas special, Russell T Davies exits
summary: The BBC has canceled the upcoming Doctor Who Christmas special. Showrunner Russell T Davies announced his departure. Decision made "after careful consideration" and "not lightly."
